feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: FINS_FXV - Advanced Foreign Currency Valuation enhancement point for selecting original data
entry.content:
Hi I need some help for advanced foreign currency valuation. In first project customer has used the one account "Account receivable" for posted the business of "Account receivable" and "advanced received" at the same time. 

According to accounting principle, only "Account receivable" which is selected by the debit balance of customer in "Account receivable" account need be valuated for currency exchange rate vary.  And on the contrary "advanced received" which is selected by the credit balance of customer in "Account receivable" account must not be valuated. 

I have checked the configuration of advanced valuation and find i can use the semantic tag as filter condition for selecting original data.  And it can not select by debit or credit balance of customer in one account.

So i want to know if is there any method make this request true?

thank you.

Darcy

entry.title: Show the approuver Decision Note in PO or PR after it has been approuved or rejected in MyInbox
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts 

I want to display the approuver Decision Note after approbation or rejection of a PR or PO 

Displayed either in PO or PR screen or in a report 

I cheked the Text TAB  to see of it's comming in the header Note or othet texts 

Could you please help me 

Thank you in advance 

Aicha,

entry.title: SAP EAM recommendation implementation
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

Need your support on processing recommendation data in SAP. 

We have a customer who uses a third-party tool for Asset Performance Management (APM). This tool provides recommendation details back to SAP. We need to build an interface to collect this data from the SAP PO-External APM application and bring it into SAP. Once we have received these recommendations, we need to perform the SAP Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) workflow within SAP. Customer does not want to review the recommendation coming from ASPM third party tool, they want to implement those changes directly in SAP and that needs to automatic process. 

For example - if the recommendation is to change the maintenance cycle from yearly to monthly, we need to build automatic process to update maintenance plan in SAP

Our customer uses on-premise S4 HANA system. Kindly provide your expert helps. thanks in advance 

Regards

Amitabh

entry.title: Error : Date 7983 cannot be converted (please correct)
entry.content:
Hello Sir/ Madam,

 In system patches are updated after problem generated. When sales order created in transaction code VA01 some material shown error " Date 7983 cannot be converted (please correct)" .  So please give solution for this problem.

 Thanks

entry.title: Convert Sales Order To Production Order
entry.content:
Hi There

i Have Non Configurable semi Finish Material with Strategy Group  ( 20   : Make-to-order production ) in mrp3 view . material have BOM , Routing , Prod Ver 

this material have sales order and , When I want to convert sales order to production order whit CO08 , After Select production Version,  system gives the following error message  :

==========================================

You cannot make an assignment to make-to-order stock

Message no. CO684

 

 

Diagnosis

The component cannot be allocated to an individual stock because make-to-order production and engineer-to-order production cannot be executed with this order.

A possible cause is that you are trying to create an order with reference to a sales-order/project, where an account assignment to a sales order/project is not allowed in the settlement profile that is assigned to the chosen order type. This is inconsistant.

System Response

The following responses are possible:

Order processing is cancelled.

The system resets the special stock indicator back to the original value.

===========================================

Does anyone have a solution?

entry.title: Business Address Services (BAS)
entry.content:
Hello- We're using Business Address Services to send the PDF copy to our customers. Standard Program 'RSCONN01' is being executed via Batch job through SCOT. I am still unable to figure out how SAP reads the Address from the SOPR table links with the Personal number and triggers an email. Keep in mind that there's no contact person maintained in the customer master data and I believe the Personal numbers were created using SADP using SODI PERS Group.

I can track everything from SOST/SOOD tables but am unable to figure out how program RSCONN01 picks up the personal number's email. 

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: "Remordplan" column in S_ALR_87013558
entry.content:
How to enable the "Remordplan" column in the S_ALR_87013558 report so that values ​​are displayed in that column?

entry.title: Download spool directly in excel
entry.content:
Is it possible to download a processing spool directly into excel ?
For example, in FAGLL03, when we run it online, we can download it directly into excel and all the fields are formatted correctly (date, values). When we run the job and download the spool, these fields are distorted.

entry.title: how to get spool file from SAP (not using SM37)
entry.content:
hi,


we would some requirement from business to download job spool and upload to sharepoint.


in SAP there are tables under SP00 and able to find the spool name, spool id, etc.


is there any program /transaction we can use to search/fetch the spool?


e.g. from end user point of view, I go SM37, search the job name, open the spool, and save


can we get the spool from program or back end by spool name or id? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.content:
Dear Experts,

please support with below question:

S_ALR_87013619 report - why there are no drill down reports assigned ?

Thank you and best regards.

Pawel

entry.title: Sales Commissions for external agents & Co.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is it possible to use the SD commission from ECC in S/4HANA until it expires?

Kind regards
Hüseyin Günes

entry.title: Prevent PDF creation in custom t code ZIW3D when we open the smart form
entry.content:
Dear Team,


Kindly suggest on the below.


1.This is to prevent conversion of smart form to pdf.
 2.What development is required.
3.If development done, this must not effect any other standard or other custom T code.


Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Steps for Creating and Paying Foreign Vendors in SAP Using APP
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m working on configuring foreign vendor payments in SAP and need some guidance on the process. Specifically, I have two main questions:

  1. How do I create a foreign vendor in SAP, including the steps and settings for a vendor based in a different country than the company code? Are specific configurations needed to handle exchange rates, taxes, or other international details?

  2. What is the process for paying foreign vendors using the Automatic Payment Program (APP)? I’d appreciate a detailed walkthrough, including configurations for handling foreign currency, payment terms, and setting up bank details for international payments.

Any advice or resources for these setups would be extremely helpful. Thanks in advance!

entry.title: According to note 1770532 we would like to confirm some information
entry.content:
Hi SAP
I would like to know the calculation of standard system HugePages for an Oracle database. As a reference, we checked SAP Note DIGITS, but it is not clear about No.2 (ABAP central system - SAP ABAP Central Instance (CI) or Primary Application Server (PAS) and Oracle database on the same host). Please provide more detailed information

 

Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create Production order from Planned order (CO40) with RFC and specific settlement rule
entry.content:
Dear all,

in our scenario the creation of production orders from planned orders is initiated by an external system. Settlement rule of the order has to be changed from material to a cost center that is given as import parameter. For this purpose, we created a RFC function module that builds a Batch Input map which is used to call CO40 and fills in the corresponding screens.

This approach worked very well for quite a long time. However, after system upgrade it stopped working. We found out that this is due to OSS 3370387 that explicitly prevents and suppresses the settlement rule dynpro when called in background (see screenshot), so that our function modules doesn't work anymore. 

Does anyone have an idea, how I can circumvent this problem? Only requirement is to create production order from planned order with individual settlement to a cost center. Maybe there's some other way (BAPI) we haven't found so far...

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: different behaviour of configuration rules between creation mode and change on SAP CX (Qa2)
entry.content:
Object:

SAP ECC LO_VC vs SAP Commerce cloud Variant configuration (CPS).

Release ECC6

Problem: during the creation of a new configuration on SAP CX, variant configuration rules are respected (if i change a characteristic value before saving, automatically slave char. values are settled) 

But when on CX we try to modify an existing configuration in a sales order (material variant), these rules are not relevant and the sistem allows only to change each slave value manually resolving the conflicts. 

We need that also in the configuration change all the slave char values are automatically settled.

entry.title: Query about HR loans (infotype 45)
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if it is possible to suspend a loa (infotype 45) for a period of time without having to pay it off and create a new one with the remaining amount.

entry.title: Availibility Check in STO Partially Shipped
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

I am transferring materials between 2 plants in the same company code. I am using an STO. I create an STO to transfer 10 pieces. When the STO gets created I do not have the material available. I manufacture 5 pieces. A job runs and creates  an outbound delivery for 5 pieces. The goods issue is posted. An inbound delivery gets created and received at the destination. Then I manufacture 5 more pieces. The job runs and no outbound delivery gets created. Even if I try manually creating the outbound delivery in VL10B, it does not work. I get an message informing that there are no schedule lines due. If I enter in the STO in change mode and run the availability check again manually the outbound delivery for the remaining 5 pieces gets created by the job. Is this the standard behavior? Is there any program that we can schedule to keep running availability check for outbound deliveries automatically? 

Thanks in advance,

Mauricio

entry.title: ODBC Connection Between SAP ECC and Excel
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

I am wondering if it is possible to connect Excel to the SAP ECC 6.0 Database using ODBC and how to do it.

I know it is possible in S/4 HANA. I remember once installing an ADD-ON to Excel, establishing a connection using a user and a password and being able to use some datasets in Excel. 

Any advice would be really appreciated. 

Thanks in advance,

Mauricio

entry.title: SAP HIgh memory usage
entry.content:
Hi PERSON_NAME,
We have been observing high memory usage on SAP PERSON_NAME production system since yesterday.
Pool/PersistenceManager/PersistentSpace/DefaultLPA/LOBPage is around 66 GB now and it is increasing every hour.
 
Our current PERSON_NAME version is '2.00.059.PHONE_NUMBER'
Attaching output of "HANA_Memory_TopConsumers_TimeSlices_2.00.043+", "HANA_LOBs_DiskLOBs_2.00.040+.txt".
 

Please let us know how to stop the growing memory and bring down high memory usage on PERSON_NAME.
 Let us know what is causing the growth of LOB pages?

Thanks,
Chaitanya

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Installation

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: PERSON_NAME Software

Q: SAP PERSON_NAME Revision number and Operating System where software is being installed
A:

Q: Software being upgraded (source and target)?
A...(truncated)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
